title: 30cm Round Rattan Tray, Hand Woven Serving Tray with Handles, Wicker Serving Basket, Decorative Tray for Home Decor, Whitewash
features: Material: The woven tray is made of rattan, it has hand woven craftsmanship, beautiful texture, warm color and natural touch. It is a durable practical and beautiful decorative tray in your home.
Size: Large round tray: 34 x 6 cm and 30 x 5 cm for you to choose. You can choose suitable size tray according to you need.

Unique Design: The design of handles on both sides makes you convenient to take the ottoman tray from here to there. A tray that makes your life more textured, which is also an ideal gift for housewarming, family or friends.

Multil Functional Tray: The wicker tray is not only suitable to be a serving tray for serving food, fruit, coffee, tea, dessert, bread, cake etc, but also suitable to be a decorative tray to show your candle, vase, small planter, statue and other decorative items. you can use it in living room, bathroom, bedroom, kitchen, coffee table, nightstand table, it is suitable for anywhere in your home.
Easy Cleaning: The woven tray only need clean with damp cloth then store in a dry place, please do not expose them on sun for long time.

Easy Cleaning: The woven tray only need clean with damp cloth then store in a dry place, please do not expose them on sun for long time.
